'''Grendu''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] antiquities dealer based in the [[Tarsunt system/Legends|Tarsunt system]].

Grendu's dealings in rare antiquities often included illegal imports. One of these illegal sales was of a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] to an unknown party. He hired a [[Grizzid|notorious trader]] to transport it from the Tarsunt system. It never reached its destination, whatever that may have been, because the rancor killed Grizzid and his crew. The ship crashed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and eventually came into the possession of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Grendu" is a common Bothan [[Gender/Legends|male]] name meaning "hard-working" or "industrious".<ref name="wiz">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030717galactic|text=Bothan Names}}</ref>
